results.title: Allies profit from China export beef
results.description: This news item links to an article published in Adelaide Advertiser.

results.title: South African investors mobilize over $10million funding to back Australian miner Orion Minerals’ expansion
results.description: Australian mining company Orion Minerals is raising A$15.4 million ($10.9 million) through a share placement backed by South African institutional investors, as the company moves to accelerate development of its key copper and zinc assets in the country.
